name: chatkit-nodejs
description: Node.js server helpers for ChatKit-style thread APIs.

scripts.clean: node -e "import('node:fs/promises').then(fs => Promise.all(['dist', '.tmp'].map(path => fs.rm(path, { recursive: true, force: true }))))"
scripts.test: npm run build:test && node -e "import('node:fs/promises').then(fs => fs.cp('tests/assets', '.tmp/test/tests/assets', { recursive: true, force: true }))" && node --test .tmp/test/tests/*.test.js
scripts.test:package: npm run build && npm run build:package-test && node --test .tmp/package-test/tests/package-smoke/*.test.js
scripts.pack:check: npm run build && npm run build:scripts && node .tmp/scripts/scripts/check-package.js
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run test:package && npm run pack:check
scripts.verify:parity: npm run verify && npm run build:scripts && node .tmp/scripts/scripts/verify-parity.js
